GMAXVOLTCRASH.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Pikachu. May paralyze all opposing Pokémon.

GMAXMALODOR.name: G-Max Malodor
GMAXMALODOR.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Garbodor. May poison all opposing Pokémon.

GMAXSTUNSHOCK.name: G-Max Stun Shock
GMAXSTUNSHOCK.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Toxtricity. May poison or paralyze all opposing Pokémon.

GMAXBEFUDDLE.name: G-Max Befuddle
GMAXBEFUDDLE.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Butterfree. Opposing Pokémon may fall asleep, or become poisoned or paralyzed.

GMAXSMITE.name: G-Max Smite
GMAXSMITE.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Hatterene. May confuse all opposing Pokémon.

GMAXCUDDLE.name: G-Max Cuddle
GMAXCUDDLE.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Eevee. May infatuate all opposing Pokémon.

GMAXGOLDRUSH.name: G-Max Gold Rush
GMAXGOLDRUSH.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Meowth. May confuse all opposing Pokémon. Also earns extra money.

GMAXSTONESURGE.name: G-Max Stonesurge
GMAXSTONESURGE.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Drednaw. Scatters sharp rocks around the opposing side of the field.

GMAXSTEELSURGE.name: G-Max Steelsurge
GMAXSTEELSURGE.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Copperajah. Scatters sharp spikes around the opposing side of the field.

GMAXCENTIFERNO.name: G-Max Centiferno
GMAXCENTIFERNO.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Centiskorch. Traps all opposing Pokémon in flames for four to five turns.

GMAXSANDBLAST.name: G-Max Sandblast
GMAXSANDBLAST.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Sandaconda. Traps all opposing Pokémon in sand for four to five turns.

GMAXFOAMBURST.name: G-Max Foam Burst
GMAXFOAMBURST.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Kingler. Harshly lowers the Speed of all opposing Pokémon.

GMAXWINDRAGE.name: G-Max Wind Rage
GMAXWINDRAGE.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Corviknight. Removes effects like Reflect and Light Screen from the field.

GMAXGRAVITAS.name: G-Max Gravitas
GMAXGRAVITAS.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Orbeetle. Intensifies gravity for five turns.

GMAXFINALE.name: G-Max Finale
GMAXFINALE.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Alcremie. Heals the HP of all ally Pokémon.

GMAXSWEETNESS.name: G-Max Sweetness
GMAXSWEETNESS.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Appletun. Heals the status conditions of all ally Pokémon.

GMAXTARTNESS.name: G-Max Tartness
GMAXTARTNESS.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Flapple. Reduces the evasiveness of all opposing Pokémon.

GMAXREPLENISH.name: G-Max Replenish
GMAXREPLENISH.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Snorlax. May restore consumed Berries of all ally Pokémon.

GMAXDEPLETION.name: G-Max Depletion
GMAXDEPLETION.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Duraludon. Reduces the PP of the last move used by the target.

GMAXRESONANCE.name: G-Max Resonance
GMAXRESONANCE.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Lapras. Reduces the damage the party receives for five turns.

GMAXCHISTRIKE.name: G-Max Chi Strike
GMAXCHISTRIKE.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Machamp. Boosts the chance of critical hits for all ally Pokémon.

GMAXTERROR.name: G-Max Terror
GMAXTERROR.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Gengar. Prevents all opposing Pokémon from escaping.

GMAXSNOOZE.name: G-Max Snooze
GMAXSNOOZE.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Grimmsnarl. May lull the target into falling asleep on its following turn.

GMAXMELTDOWN.name: G-Max Meltdown
GMAXMELTDOWN.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Melmetal. Prevents opponents from using the same move twice in a row.

GMAXONEBLOW.name: G-Max One Blow
GMAXONEBLOW.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Urshifu. This single-strike move can ignore Max Guard.

GMAXRAPIDFLOW.name: G-Max Rapid Flow
GMAXRAPIDFLOW.description: A G-Max Move used by G-Max Urshifu. This rapid-strike move can ignore Max Guard.

TERABLAST.name: Tera Blast
TERABLAST.description: Move type changes to match a Terastallized user's Tera Type. Deals damage based on user's higher stat.

BREAKNECKBLITZ.name: Breakneck Blitz
BREAKNECKBLITZ.description: The user builds up its momentum using its Z-Power and crashes into the target at full speed.

ALLOUTPUMMELING.name: All-Out Pummeling
ALLOUTPUMMELING.description: The user rams an energy orb created by its Z-Power into the target with full force.

SUPERSONICSKYSTRIKE.name: Supersonic Skystrike
SUPERSONICSKYSTRIKE.description: The user soars up with its Z-Power and plummets toward the target at full speed.

ACIDDOWNPOUR.name: Acid Downpour
ACIDDOWNPOUR.description: The user creates a poisonous swamp using its Z-Power and sinks the target into it at full force.

TECTONICRAGE.name: Tectonic Rage
TECTONICRAGE.description: The user burrows deep into the ground and slams into the target with the full force of its Z-Power.

CONTINENTALCRUSH.name: Continental Crush
CONTINENTALCRUSH.description: The user summons a huge rock mountain using its Z-Power and drops it onto the target with full force.

SAVAGESPINOUT.name: Savage Spin-Out
SAVAGESPINOUT.description: The user binds the target with full force with threads of silk that the user spits using its Z-Power.

NEVERENDINGNIGHTMARE.name: Never-Ending Nightmare
NEVERENDINGNIGHTMARE.description: Deep-seated grudges summoned by the user's Z-Power trap the target.

CORKSCREWCRASH.name: Corkscrew Crash
CORKSCREWCRASH.description: The user spins very fast and rams into the target with the full force of its Z-Power.

INFERNOOVERDRIVE.name: Inferno Overdrive
INFERNOOVERDRIVE.description: The user breathes a stream of intense fire toward the target with the full force of its Z-Power.

HYDROVORTEX.name: Hydro Vortex
HYDROVORTEX.description: The user creates a huge whirling current using its Z-Power to swallow the target with full force.

BLOOMDOOM.name: Bloom Doom
BLOOMDOOM.description: The user collects energy from plants using its Z-Power and attacks the target with full force.

GIGAVOLTHAVOC.name: Gigavolt Havoc
GIGAVOLTHAVOC.description: The user hits the target with a powerful electric current collected by its Z-Power.

SHATTEREDPSYCHE.name: Shattered Psyche
SHATTEREDPSYCHE.description: The user controls the target with its Z-Power and hurts the target with full force.

SUBZEROSLAMMER.name: Subzero Slammer
SUBZEROSLAMMER.description: The user dramatically drops the temperature using its Z-Power and freezes the target with full force.

DEVASTATINGDRAKE.name: Devastating Drake
DEVASTATINGDRAKE.description: The user materializes its aura using its Z-Power and attacks the target with full force.

BLACKHOLEECLIPSE.name: Black Hole Eclipse
BLACKHOLEECLIPSE.description: The user gathers dark energy using its Z-Power and sucks the target into it.

TWINKLETACKLE.name: Twinkle Tackle
TWINKLETACKLE.description: The user creates a very charming space using its Z-Power and totally toys with the target.

CATASTROPIKA.name: Catastropika
CATASTROPIKA.description: Pikachu surrounds itself with the maximum amount of electricity using its Z-Power.

TENMILLIONVOLTTHUNDERBOLT.name: 10_000_000 Volt Thunderbolt
TENMILLIONVOLTTHUNDERBOLT.description: Pikachu wearing a cap unleashes a jolt of electricity. Critical hits land more easily.

STOKEDSPARKSURFER.name: Stoked Sparksurfer
STOKEDSPARKSURFER.description: Alolan Raichu attacks the target using its Z-Power and paralyzes the target.

EXTREMEEVOBOOST.name: Extreme Evoboost
EXTREMEEVOBOOST.description: Eevee gets energy from its evolved friends and boosts its stats sharply.

PULVERIZINGPANCAKE.name: Pulverizing Pancake
PULVERIZINGPANCAKE.description: Snorlax moves its enormous body energetically and attacks the target with full force.

GENESISSUPERNOVA.name: Genesis Supernova
GENESISSUPERNOVA.description: Mew attacks the target with full force. The terrain will be charged with psychic energy.

SINISTERARROWRAID.name: Sinister Arrow Raid
SINISTERARROWRAID.description: Decidueye shoots the target with countless arrows using its Z-Power.

MALICIOUSMOONSAULT.name: Malicious Moonsault
MALICIOUSMOONSAULT.description: Incineroar crashes into the target using its Z-Power.

OCEANICOPERETTA.name: Oceanic Operetta
OCEANICOPERETTA.description: Primarina summons a massive amount of water using its Z-Power.

SPLINTEREDSTORMSHARDS.name: Splintered Stormshards
SPLINTEREDSTORMSHARDS.description: Lycanroc attacks the target with full force. This move negates the effect on the battlefield.

LETSSNUGGLEFOREVER.name: Let's Snuggle Forever
LETSSNUGGLEFOREVER.description: After obtaining Z-Power, the user, Mimikyu, punches the target with full force.

CLANGOROUSSOULBLAZE.name: Clangorous Soulblaze
CLANGOROUSSOULBLAZE.description: Kommo-o attacks the opposing Pokémon with full force. This move boosts the user's stats.

GUARDIANOFALOLA.name: Guardian of Alola
GUARDIANOFALOLA.description: The Pokémon obtains Alola's energy using its Z-Power. This reduces the target's HP greatly.

SEARINGSUNRAZESMASH.name: Searing Sunraze Smash
SEARINGSUNRAZESMASH.description: Solgaleo attacks the target with full force and ignores the target's Ability.

MENACINGMOONRAZEMAELSTROM.name: Menacing Moonraze Maelstrom
MENACINGMOONRAZEMAELSTROM.description: Lunala attacks the target with full force and ignores the target's Ability.

LIGHTTHATBURNSTHESKY.name: Light That Burns the Sky
LIGHTTHATBURNSTHESKY.description: Deals damage based on the user's higher offensive stat. Ignores the target's Ability.
